text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower suffers an injury during training, so
I rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: It seems like I'm in worse shape than I thought...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I know I shouldn't, but I'm still going to ask...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to become an Umamusume who inspires
courage in people. I can't let some injury stop me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I understand I can't do much... but can we please
keep training?
choice_data_list: Okay. Let's find out what you can do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But while I'm resting, everyone else will still be
making progress...
choice_data_list:
Overdoing things even when you know you
shouldn't is foolish.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I'm sorry... I just don't want to get left
behind...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I shouldn't be impatient... I'll take it easy until
I'm fully healed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower looks a little disappointed as she
returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! I'll do my best!
Promise!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but it hurts more than I thought it would...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'll have to put my training on hold for a
while...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seemingly in quite a bit of pain, Nishino Flower
slowly limps back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Looks like I can handle light exercise just
fine!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'll do what I can without pushing too hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower looks very satisfied and
successfully completes her training session while
taking care not to aggravate her injury.
